title: T'ssolok

{{Quote|Once a year, and only once a year, I order this Twi'lek t'ssolok, and guaranteed within two or three days, you show up at my doorstep, looking like Death's first mate just took a shot at you.|Reuther, speaking to Thaddeus Ross|<ref name="LaD" />}}
'''T'ssolok''' was an intensely [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Liquor/Legends|liquor]]. Possessed of a creamy [[Color/Legends|coloration]] and imbued with optional [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] additives during its creation, the standing flavor of t'ssolok was widely considered to be disappointing, though the beverage made up for such shortcomings with a delicious aftertaste. T'ssolok was traditionally served in a decorative decanter, and was thought to increase the effectiveness of any enhancers the drinker additionally consumed.<ref name="Galaxies" />

During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the former [[Najib]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] known as [[Reuther]] would order a shipment of t'ssolok once a [[Standard year/Legends|year]], that he served at his [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Najiba/Legends|Najiba]], [[Reuther's Wetdock]]. Whenever [[Gender/Legends|his]] associate, [[Thaddeus Ross]], stopped over at the nearby [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], Reuther and Ross would typically talk at the cantina over a shared bottle of t'ssolok.<ref name="LaD" />

==Behind the scenes==
T'ssolok was first introduced to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe in the short story [[Laughter After Dark (short story)|''Laughter After Dark'']], written by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Patricia A. Jackson]], and published as part of the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 15|fifteenth]] issue of [[West End Games]]' [[Star Wars Adventure Journal]] in [[November]] [[1997]].<ref name="LaD" /> It later appeared in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' [[Star Wars video games|MMORPG]], where it was visually depicted for the first time.<ref name="Galaxies" />
